en.portfolio.title: Portfolio
en.portfolio.featured.title: QA Leadership at OpenLoop
en.portfolio.featured.summary: Built a quality engineering direction that connects product delivery, automation and release confidence across critical workflows.
en.portfolio.featured.point1: Defined cross-team quality strategy and release readiness criteria.
en.portfolio.featured.point2: Prioritized automation for product-critical journeys and engineering workflows.
en.portfolio.featured.point3: Created visibility for stakeholders through clearer quality signals and reporting.
en.portfolio.toolbar.label: Focus Areas
en.portfolio.toolbar.note: Selected work across leadership, automation, API quality and academic practice.
en.portfolio.card1.title: Quality Strategy & Team Enablement
en.portfolio.card1.summary: Operating model for planning, risk reviews and accountability across multiple delivery streams.
en.portfolio.card1.impact: Impact: clearer quality ownership and stronger delivery alignment.
en.portfolio.card2.title: Playwright End-to-End Architecture
en.portfolio.card2.summary: Structured browser automation for critical journeys with maintainable fixtures and reporting.
en.portfolio.card2.impact: Impact: faster regression feedback for high-priority flows.
en.portfolio.card3.title: API & Contract Verification Layer
en.portfolio.card3.summary: Service-level validation for REST integrations, schemas and data flows before UI cycles start.
en.portfolio.card3.impact: Impact: stronger backend confidence before end-to-end execution.
en.portfolio.card4.title: CI/CD Quality Gates
en.portfolio.card4.summary: Pipeline checks that connected test evidence, smoke coverage and release decision making.
en.portfolio.card4.impact: Impact: less manual friction before deployment windows.
en.portfolio.card5.title: Software Quality Engineering @ UPC
en.portfolio.card5.summary: Teaching practice connected to conference participation, public presentations and practical QA learning experiences.
en.portfolio.card5.impact: Impact: industry-driven learning reinforced by visible academic participation and knowledge sharing.
en.portfolio.card6.title: Applied AI Research & Publications
en.portfolio.card6.summary: Peer-reviewed work connecting education, machine learning and practical software innovation through formal publication.
en.portfolio.card6.impact: Impact: a bridge between academic rigor, applied AI and real-world digital product thinking.

en.newspage.item11.title: IEEE AICCONF 2025: Mobile Application for Managing Anxiety using Machine Learning Model
en.newspage.item12.title: IEEE AICCONF 2025: A Cognitive AI Model Using Deep & Cross Network for Personalized Gamified Recommendations to Promote Healthy Eating
en.newspage.item13.title: IEEE AICCONF 2025: Eat4U — Calorie Management Based on Predictive ML Models and Instance Segmentation
en.newspage.item14.title: IEEE ISCMI 2025: A Novel Framework for Intuitive E-commerce Design — Leveraging LLMs to Translate User Commands into Code
en.newspage.item15.title: IEEE ICALTER 2025: Sort ARgorithm — An Innovative AR-Based Approach to Teaching Sorting Algorithms in Higher Education
en.newspage.item16.title: IEEE ICALTER 2024: Vik's Adventures — Enhancing Mathematical Learning Through a Serious Game with Deep Learning
en.newspage.item11.abstract: mHealth app combining ML-driven relaxation techniques for anxiety management. Gradient Boosted Trees on the LifeSnaps dataset achieved 80.76% accuracy.
en.newspage.item12.abstract: Cognitive AI framework using Deep & Cross Network for gamified dietary recommendations. Achieved 92.89% precision and 94.02% AUC-ROC.
en.newspage.item13.abstract: Mobile calorie management using Mask R-CNN for real-time food instance segmentation. Fine-tuned ResNet50 FPN V2 reached 86% Mean-IoU.
en.newspage.item14.abstract: Comparative evaluation of LLMs (GPT-4.5, Llama 4, Claude 4, Mistral) for automated e-commerce front-end generation from natural language.
en.newspage.item15.abstract: AR+AI educational app for sorting algorithms using Unity and AR Foundation. Interactive 3D simulations with AI-driven personalized feedback.
en.newspage.item16.abstract: Serious game web application combining deep learning for personalized first-year secondary math education. Model achieved 84.1% accuracy.
en.profile.hero.title: QA Lead · Professor · Author
en.profile.about.title: About
en.profile.about.p1: QA Lead at OpenLoop with over 10 years of experience in quality engineering across e-commerce, digital platforms and enterprise products. Specialist in test automation architecture using Playwright, Cypress and Serenity BDD, with a strong foundation in ISTQB methodologies.
en.profile.about.p2: Professor at Universidad Peruana de Ciencias Aplicadas (UPC) teaching Software Quality Engineering. Published author of a comprehensive QA book on Amazon and researcher with 6 IEEE conference papers on applied AI in education and health.
en.profile.experience.title: Experience
en.profile.exp1.desc: Leading quality engineering initiatives across product delivery. Defining automation strategy, CI/CD quality gates, and team enablement processes.
en.profile.exp2.desc: Led automation and strategy for e-commerce platforms. Implemented Serenity BDD frameworks, API contract testing, and CI/CD pipeline integration with quality gates.
en.profile.exp3.desc: End-to-end testing for digital platform and e-commerce applications. Built test automation foundations and quality processes from scratch.
en.profile.exp4.desc: Teaching Software Quality Engineering to undergraduate students. Bridging industry practices with academic foundations in testing, automation and quality assurance.
en.profile.education.title: Education
en.profile.edu2.degree: Diploma of Study in Management, Improvement and Redesign of Processes

es.newspage.item11.abstract: Aplicación mHealth que combina técnicas de relajación con ML para manejo de ansiedad. Gradient Boosted Trees logró 80.76% de precisión en el dataset LifeSnaps.
es.newspage.item12.abstract: Framework de IA cognitiva con Deep & Cross Network para recomendaciones dietéticas gamificadas. Alcanzó 92.89% de precisión y 94.02% AUC-ROC.
es.newspage.item13.abstract: Gestión de calorías móvil usando Mask R-CNN para segmentación de instancias alimentarias en tiempo real. ResNet50 FPN V2 ajustado alcanzó 86% Mean-IoU.
es.newspage.item14.abstract: Evaluación comparativa de LLMs (GPT-4.5, Llama 4, Claude 4, Mistral) para generación automatizada de front-end e-commerce a partir de lenguaje natural.
es.newspage.item15.abstract: App educativa con RA+IA para algoritmos de ordenamiento usando Unity y AR Foundation. Simulaciones 3D interactivas con retroalimentación personalizada por IA.
es.newspage.item16.abstract: Juego serio web con deep learning para educación matemática personalizada de primer año de secundaria. El modelo alcanzó 84.1% de precisión.
es.profile.hero.title: QA Lead · Profesor · Autor
es.profile.about.title: Acerca de
es.profile.about.p1: QA Lead en OpenLoop con más de 10 años de experiencia en ingeniería de calidad en e-commerce, plataformas digitales y productos empresariales. Especialista en arquitectura de automatización de pruebas con Playwright, Cypress y Serenity BDD, con sólida base en metodologías ISTQB.
es.profile.about.p2: Profesor en la Universidad Peruana de Ciencias Aplicadas (UPC) enseñando Ingeniería de Calidad de Software. Autor publicado de un libro integral de QA en Amazon e investigador con 6 papers en conferencias IEEE sobre IA aplicada en educación y salud.
es.profile.experience.title: Experiencia
es.profile.exp1.desc: Liderando iniciativas de ingeniería de calidad en entrega de producto. Definiendo estrategia de automatización, quality gates CI/CD y procesos de habilitación de equipos.
es.profile.exp2.desc: Lideré automatización y estrategia para plataformas de e-commerce. Implementé frameworks Serenity BDD, testing de contratos API e integración CI/CD con quality gates.
es.profile.exp3.desc: Testing end-to-end para plataformas digitales y aplicaciones de e-commerce. Construí las bases de automatización de pruebas y procesos de calidad desde cero.
es.profile.exp4.desc: Enseñando Ingeniería de Calidad de Software a estudiantes de pregrado. Conectando prácticas de la industria con fundamentos académicos en testing, automatización y aseguramiento de calidad.
